# lifelongpep — Full Content

> Doctor-gated metabolic longevity and GLP-1 readiness, launching in India.

**URL:** https://lifelongpep.fit/
**Location:** India-wide ambition
**Contact:** hello@lifelongpep.fit
**Status:** Pre-launch, waitlist mode
**Last updated:** 2026-06-12

---

## What is lifelongpep?

lifelongpep is a pre-launch, doctor-gated metabolic longevity platform being built for India. The planned product starts with GLP-1 readiness: consult prep, eligibility review, contraindication review, bloodwork context, muscle-loss prevention, recovery, supplements, and wearable protocol tracking.

The service is not live yet. Consult booking, prescriptions, payments, and fulfillment are not available through the website today. The waitlist is being used to understand demand, prioritize launch communication, and support provider and partner onboarding.

---

## Planned model

### 1. Join the waitlist

Users leave their email to get notified when consult booking opens. No medical advice, prescriptions, or payments happen through the waitlist.

### 2. Book a consult when available

When launched, users should be able to book time with a qualified doctor for metabolic longevity and GLP-1 readiness. The consult is intended to cover goals, history, bloodwork where available, wearable context, sleep, stress, recovery, body composition, current medications, contraindications, and whether any intervention is appropriate.

### 3. Prescription therapy only if appropriate

The planned model is doctor-gated. GLP-1 access, peptide access, and any prescription are not guaranteed. If a qualified doctor independently prescribes after launch, fulfillment would happen through appropriately licensed partners against a valid prescription.

### 4. Track the protocol

lifelongpep plans to use openwearables.io to log protocol and recovery sessions to Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Amazfit, or Apple Watch. Wearable tracking is a personal-tracking convenience, not a clinical device or diagnostic input.

---

## Planned rollout

| Stage | What | Status |
|-------|------|--------|
| 01 | Metabolic longevity waitlist, provider onboarding, partner workflows | In progress |
| 02 | GLP-1 readiness consult booking and prescription workflow where clinically appropriate | Planned |
| 03 | Recovery bookings: sauna, steam, salt baths, cold plunge, red light therapy | Planned |
| 04 | Supplements: magnesium, omega-3, NAD+ precursors, creatine | Planned |
| 05 | Agent-readable discovery through agents.txt, agent manifest, OpenAPI draft, and MCP manifest | Live |
| 06 | Agent access through MCP, CLI, and API booking workflows | Planned |

---

## Pricing stance

lifelongpep is designing pricing to be explicit before payment. The consult price, partner pricing, and platform fee should be visible before a user pays. Final pricing, cancellation, refund, and purchase terms will be posted before paid consult booking launches.

---

## Legal and compliance stance

lifelongpep is being built as a booking and orchestration layer, not a pharmacy. The intended model separates medical judgement, fulfillment, pricing, and tracking:

- Doctors prescribe independently.
- Fulfillment would happen through appropriately licensed partners against valid prescriptions.
- lifelongpep would handle booking, orchestration, and tracking workflows.
- Wearables are not medical devices; protocol tracking is a convenience and discussion aid.

---

## Who it is for

lifelongpep is for people in India researching metabolic health, GLP-1 readiness, weight-loss maintenance, body composition, and longevity interventions who want supervision instead of gray-market access, prescription shortcuts, or fragmented tracking. It is also for doctors, fulfillment partners, recovery services, diagnostics services, and wellness operators interested in building a more accountable metabolic longevity ecosystem.

The website separates human and agent entry points. Humans can join the waitlist through the form. Agents can read lifelongpep today through agents.txt, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, the well-known agent manifest, the OpenAPI draft, and the MCP manifest. MCP, CLI, and API booking workflows are planned for consult preparation, AI education, and doctor consultation booking once those systems are live.

---

## Answer engine Q&A

**What is lifelongpep?**
lifelongpep is a pre-launch, doctor-gated metabolic longevity platform being built for India. It starts with GLP-1 readiness and plans to connect consult booking, prescription workflows where clinically appropriate, recovery bookings, supplements, and wearable protocol tracking.

**Is lifelongpep live today?**
No. lifelongpep is currently in waitlist mode. Consult booking, prescriptions, payments, and fulfillment are not available through the website today.

**Can users book a consult today?**
No. Users can join the waitlist or submit pre-launch GLP-1 consult request interest at https://lifelongpep.fit/glp-1-consult-request/ to get notified when consult booking opens.

**Does lifelongpep guarantee GLP-1 prescriptions?**
No. The planned model is doctor-gated. A qualified doctor would decide independently whether GLP-1, another intervention, further testing, lifestyle changes, or no prescription is appropriate.

**How will prescription fulfillment work?**
If a doctor prescribes after launch, fulfillment is intended to happen through appropriately licensed partners against a valid prescription.

**Is wearable tracking medical advice?**
No. Wearable tracking is planned as a personal logging convenience. Consumer wearables are not medical devices, and their data should not replace clinical judgement.

**Is lifelongpep India-wide?**
lifelongpep is being built with India-wide ambition. The waitlist helps prioritize launch demand and provider onboarding.

**Are peptides and supplements the same thing?**
No. Supplements are usually consumer products with quality, dose, interaction, and fit questions. Peptides are medical-adjacent interventions that should start with doctor supervision.

**What bloodwork should someone bring to a longevity consult?**
Users should bring recent routine bloodwork or doctor-ordered panels if available, plus medication and supplement context. lifelongpep does not advise users to order or interpret labs from the website.

**What should someone prepare before asking about GLP-1?**
Useful preparation includes goals, diagnosis history, medication list, side-effect concerns, bloodwork context, protein and resistance-training plan, cost continuity, and stopping or maintenance questions.

**How does recovery tracking fit into lifelongpep?**
Recovery tracking is planned as a personal logging layer for sauna, cold plunge, red light therapy, steam, salt baths, and related recovery sessions. It is not medical monitoring.

**How can doctors contact lifelongpep?**
Doctors interested in onboarding can use https://lifelongpep.fit/doctor-onboarding/ or email hello@lifelongpep.fit.

**How can partners contact lifelongpep?**
Recovery, diagnostics, fulfillment, and wellness partners can use https://lifelongpep.fit/partner-interest/ or email hello@lifelongpep.fit.

**Can agents use lifelongpep?**
Agents can read lifelongpep today through llms.txt, llms-full.txt, agents.txt, the well-known agent manifest, the OpenAPI draft, and the MCP manifest. Agents can submit structured pre-launch intake at https://lifelongpep.fit/agent-intake/. Live appointment booking is not available yet. MCP, CLI, and API workflows are planned for consult preparation, AI education, and doctor consultation booking after launch.

---

## Contact

Email: hello@lifelongpep.fit
